headlines.title: Oil surges to $100 per barrel after Red Sea attacks
headlines.description: Oil prices rose Thursday to their highest levels in nearly two months after the latest Iran war escalation threatened severe new disruptions to global energy supplies.

headlines.title: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Oil surges past $95 as U.S. downplays Iran diplomacy and 2nd trade route is disrupted
headlines.description: The international benchmark Brent crude rose almost 5% to hit more than $95 per barrel for the first time in almost six weeks.

headlines.title: How Your Credit Score Works (and How to Boost it)
headlines.description: Credit scores determine your interest rate on everything from auto loans to mortgages, so finance expert and host of the “So Money” podcast, Farnoosh Torabi, joins TODAY to break down everything you need to know. She explains what a credit score is, the most common mistakes, how to boost your score, and more. See her tips!

headlines.title: Which US Cities Are Hiring? LinkedIn Shares List of Best Places
headlines.description: LinkedIn editor-in-chief Dan Roth stops by TODAY to share an exclusive first look at its list of cities with the fastest job growth. Harrisburg, Pennsylvania comes in at No. 5 and Sarasota, Florida, at No. 4. See which cities nabbed the top 3 spots!

headlines.title: Travel in Style on Any Budget With These Tips for Using Rewards
headlines.description: U.S. News and World Report senior editor, Elizabeth von Tersch, joins TODAY with an exclusive look at its list of the best travel rewards programs and shares pro tips for making the most of your points. See which program came in at No. 1 on their list!

headlines.title: A Look at the Latest Financial Scams: 'Whaling,' Job Offers, More
headlines.description: With thieves constantly getting creative with ways to get your money, NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY with her tips for avoiding some of the latest financial scams, including false job offers, wrong numbers, fraud alerts and more. She explains how to spot the signs of a scam and what to do if you are suspicious.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Gas prices hit $4 again after oil soars more than 15% in a week
headlines.description: Since the start of the year, U.S. crude and international Brent oil prices have risen about 45%.

headlines.title: Judge pauses Paramount-Warner merger
headlines.description: Twelve state attorneys general requested a temporary restraining order barring Paramount Skydance from closing the blockbuster deal.

headlines.title: How Burger King is preparing for the GLP-1 revolution
headlines.description: As weight loss drugs reshape how Americans eat, Burger King is gearing up for a future where customers still want fast food — just less of it.
